title: LogCorrelation
description: Result of correlating a redteam finding against application log streams. Stored as JSONB in redteam_findings.log_correlation. v1.5 feature — will be null in v1.

status.description: Whether matching log entries were found for this finding.

correlation_method.description: Algorithm used to match the finding to log entries, e.g. 'trace_hash_exact', 'timestamp_window'.

confidence_score.description: How confident the correlator is in the match (0–1).

source.description: Log origin, e.g. container name or service identifier.
